free_text: Fusion in the 20Ne + 24Mg system
Technological University, Cracow, Poland
Data taken from the report.
Data from preceding experiment at 55 and 85 MeV but
some evaporation residues are not accounted.
The 24Mg target (1 mg/cm2 thick) evaporated on lead
(20 mg/cm2 thick) backing was supported by pure lead
foil (300 mg/cm2 thick) on a bismuth frame.
In-beam gamma-ray spectroscopy
High resolution detector positioned at an
angle 90 degree with respect to beam direction in
order to minimize doppler effects.
Cross section derived by multiplication of the
relative gamma intensity by an incident energy
dependent normalization factor (Table II of Report
No information on source of uncertainties.
Mass distribution of evaporation residues is
given in Fig. 2 to 5 of Phys.Rev.C27(1983)207
Charge distribution of evaporation residues is
given in Fig. 6 of Phys.Rev.C27(1983)207
Table III of Report INP-1154, 1981
VT + LV
